expectations.evidence: opencollection.yml exists with info.name: 'Blog Posts CRUD API', info.version: '1', info.type: 'collection'
.env.sample exists with API_TOKEN=your-api-token-here and BASE_URL placeholders
environments/local.yml exists with vars.baseUrl: '{{process.env.BASE_URL}}' and vars.apiToken: '{{process.env.API_TOKEN}}'
All folder.yml files contain before-request script with req.setHeader('Authorization', `Bearer ${token}`) using bru.getEnvVar('apiToken')
1.2-missing-title.yml expects 400/422, 1.3-missing-body.yml expects 400/422, 1.5-invalid-author-id.yml expects 400/422 with author reference
All test files use YAML format with info/http/runtime keys (e.g., 1.1-happy-path.yml has info.name, http.method, runtime.scripts)
1.1-happy-path.yml calls bru.setVar('createdPostId', res.body.id); setup files like 2.0-setup-create-post.yml call bru.setVar('readPostId', res.body.id) for use in subsequent tests
Tests use Chai expect() throughout, e.g., expect(res.status).to.equal(201), expect(res.body).to.have.property('id'), expect(res.body.title).to.equal('E2E Test Post')
